stem: A agricultural research study surveys 1000 seeds planted and observes 128 positive outcomes out of 1000 (12.8%). Estimate the true germination rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.128. Wilson 95% CI: [0.1087, 0.1501]. Point estimate: 0.1294.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
